arts.ttl: Why West Brom fans can play vital role in grieving family's search for answers, writes IAN HERBERT
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: It's been more than six months since Steve Townsend lost his brother, Mark, but the pain lingers. It was etched across his face when I saw him at a coroner's court in Sheffield last week.

arts.ttl: ‘Great player’ – West Brom loan man hailed by boss after impressive form
arts.sum: West Brom’s Reyes Cleary has been labelled as a ‘great player’ by Hartlepool United boss Anthony Limbrick. West… The post ‘Great player’ – West Brom loan man hailed by boss after impressive form appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning shares simple response to questions around George Earthy's Bristol City future
arts.sum: Liam Manning has shared a simple response to questions about George Earthy's future at Bristol City beyond the end of his loan spell at Ashton Gate, admitting the Reds will "see in the summer" what happens with the attacking midfielder. George Earthy played an important role as Bristol City secured a crucial 2-1 win over Watford at Ashton Gate

arts.ttl: Scott Twine, Ross McCrorie, Joe Williams: Bristol City team news ahead of West Brom visit
arts.sum: Liam Manning has admitted it is possible that Scott Twine could be in contention to feature for Bristol City in their clash with West Brom after the attacking midfielder missed the Robins' win over Watford with a groin injury. Scott Twine, Ross McCrorie, Joe Williams: Bristol City team news ahead of West Brom visit

arts.ttl: Neil Harris makes Josh Stokes claim as Bristol City loanee nears end of Cambridge loan spell
arts.sum: Cambridge United boss Neil Harris has claimed he believes Josh Stokes is in a position to push his way into the Bristol City squad next season as he nears the end of his loan spell with the U's. Bristol City loanee Josh Stokes has scored six goals in 27 League One appearances for Cambridge United this season

arts.ttl: ‘We’ll see’ – Liam Manning quizzed on potential Bristol City summer deal for West Ham prospect
arts.sum: Bristol City are yet to hold talks over George Earthy’s future but Liam Manning didn’t rule out the… The post ‘We’ll see’ – Liam Manning quizzed on potential Bristol City summer deal for West Ham prospect appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 3 Tom Lawrence alternatives West Brom should eye amid summer transfer link
arts.sum: West Brom still have plenty to play for this season but rumours over summer transfer targets have started… The post 3 Tom Lawrence alternatives West Brom should eye amid summer transfer link appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Time to get BS3 rocking as Bristol City secure season-defining win vs Watford
arts.sum: The three points saw Bristol City climb into sixth place in the league, the final play-off position and, for the first time this season, we remain in the top six, with all Championship games completed over the weekend. We managed the game out well, until Watford substitute Mamadou Doumbia popped up with a strike out of nowhere, 10 minutes from the end of normal time, to give his team a lifeline and raise the nervous tension in the home stands.

arts.ttl: Tom Cleverley makes honest admission as he offers verdict on Bristol City goal in win vs Watford
arts.sum: Liam Manning's Robins climbed into the Championship play-off places with a 2-1 win over Cleverley's side on Saturday afternoon as first-half goals from Ross McCrorie and Wells ensured Mamadou Doumbia's late strike was little more than a consolation. Tom Cleverley has offered his verdict on Nahki Wells' goal in Bristol City's win over Watford, suggesting the ball went out of play in the build-up.

arts.ttl: Bristol City verdict as Manning's Reds set play-off platform with Watford win
arts.sum: It can be difficult to single out a star player after games like the one played at Ashton Gate on Saturday afternoon as to a man, Bristol City hit their standards. In the final 10 minutes of Bristol City's clash with Watford on Saturday afternoon, the home supporters will have likely experienced almost every emotion, good and bad, possible in sport.
